name: Eternal
description: Cannot be removed or transformed from your Deck.

name: Ethereal
description: If this card is in your Hand at the end of this turn, it is Exhausted.

name: Exhaust
description: Removed until the end of combat.

name: Innate
description: Start each combat with this card in your Hand.

name: Retain
description: Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.

name: Sly
description: If this card is discarded from your Hand before the end of your turn, play it for free.
